2.1.4: User accounts are now stored in the cloud — no more hardcoded passwords
Added account request system on the login screen
Added forgot password link on the login screen
Added Change PW button in the app header to request a password reset
Admin panel now shows which users are online with a green dot
Admin panel shows last active time for each user
Admin panel shows which script each user is currently running
Added kick feature — instantly removes a user from the app
Added ban feature with custom durations (1hr, 6hr, 24hr, 7 days, 30 days, permanent)
Scripts are now stored in the cloud instead of GitHub
Admin can upload new scripts directly from the app without an update
Admin can enable/disable individual scripts without removing them
Admin can change which servers each script appears on
Added script run stats across all users with leaderboard
Admin can change and reset user passwords from the panel
Added PW Requests tab — users can request a password reset from the admin
App automatically logs out after 20 minutes of inactivity if no scripts are running
What's New popup now appears after each update
